scripts.db:migrate:dev: npx wrangler d1 execute blue-moon-dev  --env development --local  --file=migrations/0001_init.sql
scripts.db:migrate:dev:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute blue-moon-dev  --env development --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: npx wrangler d1 execute blue-moon-prod --env production  --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql
